label: System Info — CPU / Memory / Disk
command: echo '=== CPU ===' && lscpu | grep -E 'Model name|Socket|Core|Thread' && echo '=== MEMORY ===' && free -h && echo '=== DISK ===' && df -h

label: Kernel Version + Loaded Modules
command: uname -r && lsmod | head -30

label: WARNING! Load Kernel Module (edit command first)
command: modprobe uio

label: WARNING! Unload Kernel Module (edit command first)
command: modprobe -r uio

label: eBPF — List Running BPF Programs
command: bpftool prog list 2>/dev/null || echo 'bpftool not installed: sudo apt install linux-tools-$(uname -r)'

label: eBPF — Trace System Calls (5s sample)
command: timeout 5 bpftrace -e 'tracepoint:raw_syscalls:sys_enter { @[comm] = count(); } END { print(@); }' 2>/dev/null || echo 'bpftrace not installed: sudo apt install bpftrace'

label: eBPF — Trace Block I/O Latency (5s sample)
command: timeout 5 bpftrace -e 'tracepoint:block:block_rq_complete { @ns[args->rwbs] = hist(args->nr_sector); } END { print(@ns); }' 2>/dev/null || echo 'bpftrace not installed'

label: GPIO — List Available GPIO Chips
command: ls /dev/gpiochip* 2>/dev/null && gpioinfo 2>/dev/null || echo 'No GPIO chips found (check --privileged and /dev passthrough)'

label: GPIO — Read All Lines (chip 0)
command: gpioinfo gpiochip0 2>/dev/null || echo 'libgpiod not installed: sudo apt install gpiod'

label: I2C — Scan Bus 1 for Devices
command: i2cdetect -y 1 2>/dev/null || echo 'i2c-tools not installed: sudo apt install i2c-tools'

label: CAN Bus — Show Interface Status
command: ip -details link show type can 2>/dev/null || echo 'No CAN interfaces found'

label: CAN Bus — Bring Up can0 at 500kbps
command: ip link set can0 type can bitrate 500000 && ip link set up can0 && echo 'can0 up at 500kbps'

label: Real-Time — Set Process Priority (edit PID/nice first)
command: renice -n -10 -p $(pgrep -f ros2 | head -1) 2>/dev/null && echo 'Priority set' || echo 'No ROS2 process found'

label: Real-Time — Enable PREEMPT_RT Check
command: uname -v | grep -i preempt && echo 'PREEMPT_RT kernel active' || echo 'Standard kernel (not PREEMPT_RT)'

label: ROS2 — Check ROS2 Environment
command: env | grep -i ros && ros2 --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'ROS2 not sourced. Source with: source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash'

label: ROS2 — List Active Nodes
command: ros2 node list 2>/dev/null || echo 'No ROS2 nodes running or ROS2 not installed'

label: ROS2 — Launch ROS2 CLI (interactive)
command: bash --rcfile <(echo 'source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash 2>/dev/null || true; PS1="[ROS2]\$ "')

label: Docker — List Running Containers
command: docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}'

label: Docker — Container CPU/Memory Stats
command: docker stats --no-stream --format 'table {{.Name}}\t{{.CPUPerc}}\t{{.MemUsage}}'

label: Network — Active Connections Summary
command: ss -tuln && echo '---' && ip route

label: Backup All Saved Buttons
command: __INTERNAL_BACKUP__
